description_long: This armchair features a robust, woven rattan or synthetic wicker frame with a natural brown finish, giving it a rustic yet contemporary appearance. The seat and backrest are fitted with thick, light gray cushions that provide comfort and contrast visually with the darker frame. The armrests are wide and fully integrated into the woven structure, offering substantial support and a cohesive look. The chair sits on short, sturdy legs that are mostly concealed by the woven material, ensuring stability. The entire piece is placed on a large, light-colored area rug with a subtle geometric pattern, enhancing its urban outdoor or patio appeal. The overall design suggests durability and comfort, suitable for parks, patios, or urban relaxation zones.
description: A woven rattan-style armchair with thick light gray cushions and wide integrated armrests, set on a large patterned rug. The design is sturdy, comfortable, and ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the seat, the thickness of the back cushion, and the woven texture of the armrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, plush cushions, and the symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, emphasizing the armrest and cushion profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the woven backrest and the subtle curvature of the frame.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, woven rattan-style, integrated with the frame
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, straight, with a thick removable cushion
attribute_leg_type: short, block feet, mostly concealed by woven material
